TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dominica, title = Dominica, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dominica} }

S.FORM: Dominica hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 25 N, 61 20 W na cung-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 751 sq km (maki' tay 189 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 751 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 73,757. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 34.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 59.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 6.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Roseau. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Charles Savarin, aring ryax 2 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Dominica hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 25 N, 61 20 W na cung-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 751 sq km (maki' tay 189 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 751 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 73,757. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 34.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 59.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 6.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Roseau. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Charles Savarin, aring ryax 2 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: *omini ¶~ ®a ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** w na ¶~ ®uŇč-me ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj *** …£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ros~…ēeau. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßarles~…ē s~…ēa*arin, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
